steps.expected: App loads with album cover and controls visible
steps.observed: App loaded successfully with album cover, title, age filter, and reroll button visible
Mobile layout rendered correctly with all elements visible

steps.expected: Loading overlay appears over album cover with spinner
steps.observed:
Loading overlay confirmed via DOM inspection: `
` containing Loader2 spinner component

domInspection.overlayClasses: absolute inset-0 grid place-items-center rounded-[var(--radius)] bg-white/30 backdrop-blur-sm

steps.expected: App loads with album title visible
steps.observed: App loaded with title 'Folge XX: Title' visible

steps.action: Trigger reroll by clicking Reroll button
steps.expected: Album title and metadata text become blurred and semi-transparent during loading
steps.observed: DOM inspection confirmed title element has blur-[1.5px] opacity-60 classes applied during loading state. Metadata div also gets blur-[1.5px] opacity-60 classes.

domInspection.blurClass: blur-[1.5px] opacity-60 applied to both title h2 and metadata div during loading state

steps.expected: App loads with album cover visible

steps.action: Trigger reroll by clicking Reroll button
steps.expected: Album cover has subtle scale pulse animation during reroll
steps.observed: DOM inspection confirmed img element receives 'rerolling' class during loading, which triggers the reroll-pulse animation (scale 1 to 1.015)

domInspection.imgClassesDuringLoading: album-enter h-full w-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 ease-out group-hover:scale-[1.02] rerolling

frictions.description: The loading state is very fast (sub-100ms) making it difficult to capture visual evidence via screenshot timing alone
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser network route with delay (--delay 1500) to artificially slow the API response, and used JavaScript DOM inspection with setTimeout to capture the exact classes applied during loading

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. All loading animations confirmed working: loading overlay with spinner (VAL-LOAD-002), title/metadata blur effect (VAL-LOAD-003), and album cover pulse animation (VAL-LOAD-006). DOM inspection verified correct CSS classes are applied during loading state.
